description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a sturdy rectangular frame with a combination of wood and metal materials. The seating area consists of two wide, dark-cushioned pads, each with a matching cylindrical backrest for comfort. The left side of the bench incorporates a wooden slat platform, which can serve as a small table or resting surface for personal items. The back of the bench reveals the structural supports for the backrests, which are integrated into the frame. The legs are straight and robust, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for parks, plazas, or urban relaxation areas.
description: A modern bench with dual cushioned seats, cylindrical backrests, and a wooden side platform, supported by a sturdy metal frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the cushions and the wooden platform extending to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two cushioned seats and backrests, with the wooden platform visible on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the full length of the seat cushions and the wooden platform on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backrest supports and the continuous wooden platform along the back.
